title: dryopteris spinulosa var. intermedia
intro: Dryopteris spinulosa var. intermedia, also known as the intermediate spiny wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris spinulosa var. intermedia include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting immune function and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
